ddls:
CREATE TABLE "enemies" (
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enemy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the enemy */,
  "in_game_description" TEXT /* In-game description of the enemy */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the enemy */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the enemy */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the enemy (e.g., ground, aerial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the enemy was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemy_attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy the attribute belongs to */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., health_points, attack_pattern) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., numeric, textual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the attribute */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_attributes_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemy_appearances" (
  "appearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appearance */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy the appearance belongs to */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the enemy appears */,
  "conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the enemy appears (e.g., time of day, player progress) */,
  "specific_conditions" TEXT /* More detailed conditions (e.g., weather, player actions) */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* How often the enemy appears under the given conditions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_appearances_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number (e.g., 1.6.0) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes and updates included in the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the version */,
  "is_stable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is stable or a beta */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enemy_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy the update belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the update was made in */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Changes made to the enemy in the version */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update was made */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_updates_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES game_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enemy_updates_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy the interaction belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the interaction belongs to */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the interaction (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "damage_dealt" INTEGER /* Average damage dealt to the enemy */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "player_strategy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to strategies table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_player_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_interactions_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "game_progress" TEXT /* Progress of the player in the game */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Last active date of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy */,
  "enemy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enemy the strategy belongs to */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the strategy */,
  "efficacy" REAL /* Measure of how effective the strategy is */,
  "popular_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating popularity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_enemy_id FOREIGN KEY ("enemy_id") REFERENCES enemies ("enemy_id")
)
